STREET GEN v4 — crosswalks restored as approved

Rebuilt on everything you taught: white lane dividers ONLY between same-direction lanes, your fat yellow median dividing traffic (U-TURN COUNTRY preset goes extra fat), crosswalk bands, your mounted signs standing on poles along the sidewalks, wrecks 2x3 in lanes, litter sub-cell, fires on the darkness rhythm. Road widths shown per preset.
